fields.label: Planned Date Basis
fields.options:
Job Date
ETD
ETA
Booking Date
Manual
None
fields.description: Parent date used as this milestone's planned_end.

fields.label: Planned Start Reduction (Days)
fields.description: Days to reduce from Planned Date Basis for planned_start (e.g. 7 = planned_start 7 days before planned_end)

fields.label: Update Trigger
fields.description: When set, updates milestone actual_end and status (Completed). Date Based: sync with parent date field. Field Based: complete when parent field meets condition.

fields.label: Sync Parent Date Field
fields.description: Parent field to sync with this milestone's date completed. Set 'Applies to DocType' on the template and refresh to load options.

fields.label: Sync Direction
fields.options:
Both
Parent to Milestone only
Milestone to Parent only

fields.label: Trigger Field
fields.description: Parent doctype field for condition. Set 'Applies to DocType' on the template and refresh to load options.

fields.label: Trigger Condition
fields.options:
Is set
Not empty
Equals
Is empty
In list

fields.label: Trigger Value
fields.description: For Equals or comma-separated for In list

fields.label: Trigger Action
fields.options:
Complete milestone
Set actual_end from field
